<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>GitHub Banner</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@400;700;900&family=Cinzel+Decorative:wght@400;700&display=swap');

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    width: 736px;
    height: 414px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #000;
    font-family: 'Cinzel', serif;
  }

  .banner {
    position: relative;
    width: 736px;
    height: 414px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* Background image with slow zoom */
  .bg {
    position: absolute;
    inset: -20px;
    background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center;
    filter: brightness(0.55) contrast(1.15);
    animation: slowZoom 20s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    transform-origin: center center;
  }

  @keyframes slowZoom {
    0%   { transform: scale(1.0) translateX(0px); }
    100% { transform: scale(1.08) translateX(-10px); }
  }

  /* Grain overlay */
  .grain {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    opacity: 0.04;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    background-size: 128px 128px;
    animation: grainShift 0.5s steps(1) infinite;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  @keyframes grainShift {
    0%  { background-position: 0 0; }
    25% { background-position: -20px 10px; }
    50% { background-position: 10px -20px; }
    75% { background-position: -10px -10px; }
  }

  /* Vignette */
  .vignette {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center,
      transparent 30%,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.5) 70%,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.92) 100%
    );
  }

  /* Top dark bar */
  .top-bar {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 120px;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,0.85), transparent);
  }

  /* Bottom dark bar */
  .bottom-bar {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 140px;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.92), transparent);
  }

  /* Particles */
  .particles {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .particle {
    position: absolute;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: drift linear infinite;
  }

  @keyframes drift {
    0%   { transform: translate(0, 100%) rotate(0deg); opacity: 0; }
    10%  { opacity: 1; }
    90%  { opacity: 0.5; }
    100% { transform: translate(var(--tx), -20px) rotate(360deg); opacity: 0; }
  }

  /* Horizontal scan lines */
  .scanlines {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(
      0deg,
      transparent,
      transparent 2px,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.03) 2px,
      rgba(0,0,0,0.03) 4px
    );
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* Content */
  .content {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .top-line {
    font-family: 'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: 8px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    animation: fadeIn 2s ease forwards;
    opacity: 0;
    animation-delay: 0.3s;
  }

  .divider-line {
    width: 220px;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.3), transparent);
    animation: expandWidth 1.5s ease forwards;
    transform: scaleX(0);
    animation-delay: 0.6s;
  }

  @keyframes expandWidth {
    to { transform: scaleX(1); }
  }

  .name {
    font-family: 'Cinzel Decorative', serif;
    font-size: 52px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #fff;
    letter-spacing: 6px;
    text-shadow:
      0 0 40px rgba(255,255,255,0.15),
      0 0 80px rgba(255,255,255,0.08),
      2px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
    animation: nameReveal 1.8s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) forwards;
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(20px);
    animation-delay: 0.8s;
  }

  @keyframes nameReveal {
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  .divider-line2 {
    width: 160px;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.25), transparent);
    animation: expandWidth 1.5s ease forwards;
    transform: scaleX(0);
    animation-delay: 1.2s;
  }

  .tagline {
    font-family: 'Cinzel', serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: 5px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.38);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    animation: fadeIn 2s ease forwards;
    opacity: 0;
    animation-delay: 1.5s;
  }

  @keyframes fadeIn {
    to { opacity: 1; }
  }

  /* Corner decorations */
  .corner {
    position: absolute;
    width: 30px;
    height: 30px;
    border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    border-style: solid;
    animation: fadeIn 2s ease forwards;
    opacity: 0;
    animation-delay: 1.8s;
  }
  .corner.tl { top: 18px; left: 20px; border-width: 1px 0 0 1px; }
  .corner.tr { top: 18px; right: 20px; border-width: 1px 1px 0 0; }
  .corner.bl { bottom: 18px; left: 20px; border-width: 0 0 1px 1px; }
  .corner.br { bottom: 18px; right: 20px; border-width: 0 1px 1px 0; }

</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="banner">
  <div class="bg"></div>
  <div class="grain"></div>
  <div class="vignette"></div>
  <div class="top-bar"></div>
  <div class="bottom-bar"></div>
  <div class="scanlines"></div>

  <!-- Particles -->
  <div class="particles" id="particles"></div>

  <!-- Corner decorations -->
  <div class="corner tl"></div>
  <div class="corner tr"></div>
  <div class="corner bl"></div>
  <div class="corner br"></div>

  <!-- Text content -->
  <div class="content">
    <div class="top-line">AI &amp; Data Science</div>
    <div class="divider-line"></div>
    <div class="name">YOUR NAME</div>
    <div class="divider-line2"></div>
    <div class="tagline">Code · Build · Automate</div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  // Generate floating particles
  const container = document.getElementById('particles');
  const count = 35;
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    const p = document.createElement('div');
    p.classList.add('particle');
    const size = Math.random() * 2.5 + 0.5;
    const left = Math.random() * 100;
    const delay = Math.random() * 15;
    const duration = Math.random() * 12 + 8;
    const tx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 120;
    p.style.cssText = `
      width: ${size}px;
      height: ${size}px;
      left: ${left}%;
      bottom: -10px;
      --tx: ${tx}px;
      animation-duration: ${duration}s;
      animation-delay: ${delay}s;
      opacity: 0;
    `;
    container.appendChild(p);
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>
